intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely unsupported by the visual evidence. P1 (Yellow Pot) and P3 (Black Pot with Rabbit) are present, but P2 and P4 are not identifiable as distinct specimens. The pots appear to contain only soil and debris.

inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss. No mint foliage detected.
inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present (Black Pot with Rabbit). No Pothos foliage detected.
inventory_reconciliation.P4: Systemic Loss. No silver guest foliage detected.

plant_audit.P1: Empty soil surface. No String of Nickels visible.
plant_audit.P2: Empty soil surface. No Mexican Mint visible.
plant_audit.P3: Contains a white rabbit anchor. A single, thin, green sprout/shoot emerged in T-2 and T-1, but is absent or obscured in the current image.
plant_audit.P4: Merged with P2/P3 space. No evidence of plant life.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Dark, damp appearance consistent across all pots.
biome_observations.debris: White granular material (likely perlite or eggshell fragments) present in P3. No fungal growth observed.

temporal_deltas.T-3_to_T-2: A single, thin green shoot emerged in the P3/P4 pot area.
temporal_deltas.T-1_to_CURRENT: The shoot is no longer visible; potential postural collapse or burial.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical failure. There is no established vegetation. The single sprout observed in the mid-sequence has failed to thrive or has been lost, indicating poor soil viability or lack of light/nutrients.
vision_report.anomalies: The presence of a single, ephemeral sprout suggests an attempt at germination that failed. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is the only consistent feature.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a near-total absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots are essentially barren. The brief appearance of a sprout in the P3/P4 region suggests a failed propagation or a weed that did not survive the environment. The current state is one of dormancy or total loss.
